description.ko: 복합 유리 프리즘을 통과하는 빛이 미니멀한 흰색 표면 위에서 선명한 무지개색으로 부서지는 고정밀 시각화.
description.en: A high-precision visualization of light passing through a complex glass prism, shattering into a vivid rainbow of colors across a minimalist white surface.

prompt: A high-detail macro shot of a complex triangular glass prism resting on a minimalist matte white surface. A sharp, singular beam of pure white light enters the side, refracting into a vivid and dispersed rainbow spectrum. The scene features realistic ray-tracing, caustic light patterns, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, and sharp focus on the internal light dispersion and glass edges.
